content.text: Both blobs and folder can be “hidden” if you think you won’t need them, but don’t quite want to delete them, yet. You do this by right-clicking on them in the dashboard, and selecting “hide.” Alternatively, if you are editing a blob, you can click the hide button in the top left corner (crossed-out eye icon).
In the project navigator, you can right-click on your project to “view hidden items.” This will take you to a second dashboard with all your hidden blobs and folders.
To restore a blob or folder, go to the hidden items dashboard, right-click on a blob or folder, and select “restore."
